title: Charred, Crunchy Spanish Chicken Paella Valenciana
description: A hearty and flavorful Galician dish featuring charred chicken, crunchy vegetables, and savory saffron-infused rice.

ingredients.name: Uncooked Arborio rice
ingredients.notes: short-grain rice is best for paella

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic, thyme, and rosemary to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Add the red bell pepper and red onion to the pan and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 15-20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the pitted green olives and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
